message:
feat(command): add EVAL read-only key extraction and test coverage

Extend fr-command with key extraction for EVAL/EVALSHA read-only
mode, allowing the command dispatcher to identify which keys a Lua
script will access for read-only routing decisions.

- fr-command/src/lib.rs: extend command_keys with EVAL/EVALSHA
  read-only key extraction logic
- fr-command/tests/test_eval_ro_keys.rs: add test verifying correct
  key extraction from EVAL arguments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
